location.title: Location
location.description: City, address, or coordinates (lat,lng) to search for wellness providers

searchRadius.title: Search Radius (miles)
searchRadius.description: Radius in miles to search for providers around the location

serviceTypes.title: Wellness Service Types
serviceTypes.description: Types of wellness services to search for

dateRange.title: Date Range
dateRange.description: Filter events within this date range

eventTypes.title: Event Types
eventTypes.description: Types of events to look for

maxProviders.title: Max Providers to Scrape
maxProviders.description: Maximum number of wellness providers to search (0 = unlimited)

maxEventsPerProvider.title: Max Events per Provider
maxEventsPerProvider.description: Maximum number of events to scrape from each provider

includeDescription.title: Include Event Descriptions
includeDescription.description: Whether to scrape full event descriptions (slower but more detailed)

budgetRange.title: Budget Range
budgetRange.description: Filter events by price range (in USD)

min.title: Minimum Price
min.description: Minimum price in USD (0 for free events)

max.title: Maximum Price
max.description: Maximum price in USD (leave empty for no max)

includeOnlineProviders.title: Include Online-Only Providers
includeOnlineProviders.description: Also search for wellness providers that operate exclusively online (no physical location)

includeInstagram.title: Include Instagram Events
includeInstagram.description: Search Instagram for wellness events and classes

instagramHashtags.title: Instagram Hashtags
instagramHashtags.description: Instagram hashtags to search for events (only used if Include Instagram is enabled)

instagramAccounts.title: Instagram Accounts
instagramAccounts.description: Specific Instagram accounts to scrape for events (usernames without @)

includeTikTok.title: Include TikTok Events
includeTikTok.description: Search TikTok for wellness events and live sessions

tiktokHashtags.title: TikTok Hashtags
tiktokHashtags.description: TikTok hashtags to search for events (only used if Include TikTok is enabled)

tiktokAccounts.title: TikTok Accounts
tiktokAccounts.description: Specific TikTok accounts to scrape for events (usernames without @)
